## Documentation task

### Summary

Describe the documentation update or addition for OpenCred.

### Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Docs are clear and contributor-friendly
- [ ] Architecture or onboarding content is improved
- [ ] Links to the monorepo structure and issue templates are updated

### Notes

Good documentation is critical for open-source contributors. Keep the guide focused on architecture, workflows, and project goals.
